ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-12-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 29, 2003.
Off Calendar May-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff, Eugene Brown present with counsel, Russell Davis.
Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1- HOAs' due schedules...........................ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three returned checks.........................ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Purchaser copy of cashier check #3908990108...ID/EVID.
Court hears evidence and supporting documents presented in court, grants default judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Eric Romingquet as follows:
Unpaid checks of $30,000.00, back rent and HOA fees of $2,895.00, statutory damages total of $399.42, Costs $316.00, Interest $2,228.42, for a total judgment of $35,838.84
Plaintiff's causes of action to foreclose on real property and for elder abuse are dismissed without prejudice. Does 1-100 are dismissed. Exhibits are ordered returned.
Judgment signed in open court.
